source: Illustrative parameters based on NITI Aayog Low Carbon Development Strategy (2022) and IEA India Energy Outlook (2021)
note: Values are scenario assumptions for analytical purposes, not official projections

sector_transition_notes.power: Phase out sub-critical coal by 2035; super-critical by 2045
sector_transition_notes.cement: Clinker ratio to 0.6 by 2030; CCS deployment by 2040
sector_transition_notes.steel: 50% scrap-EAF by 2035; hydrogen DRI pilots by 2030
sector_transition_notes.transport: EV mandate for 2-wheelers by 2030; commercial fleet by 2040
sector_transition_notes.buildings: Net-zero energy code for new construction by 2030

investment_needs_usd_bn_annual.source: Illustrative, based on Standard Chartered and IEA estimates
